case_title: KONG, YIN TAK et al vs. ARD, MARTHA

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, YIN TAK WONG, DARREN YU, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT ARD, MARTHA SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-08-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-18-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-08-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-08-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-1993 Sweep; Adjudicated

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-1993 Continued To Aug-13-93 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 04
